title: GFPRendering
text: GFPRendering Use this property to control whether the web page content in the HTML widget is rendered in the Canvas. GFPRendering = | False | True Value Description False Do not render web page content in the Canvas. True Render the content of the web page specified in the Base URL property. CAUTION: Not recommended. Rendering the content affects the performance of the Canvas and poses a security risk if malicious JavaScript is executed. Usage Dynamic? No Supported in Grid? No Dependencies: Base URL Description This property is provided for compatibility with versions of Uniface prior to Uniface 9.7.02. Applies To uhtml (HTML Widget) Related Links Base URL (BaseURL) Defines the base URL used to find the related resources of the HTML widget. The value can be a directory or file.
